Interesting this is 250. But the ordering doesn’t really mean anything. I only did this work to make lower numbers tightly correspond to the early Gaiad and the only social ones are {{q|q1}} {{q|q2}} {{q|q3}}

I might extend this up to 270 where things actually start to be populated like normal. But it was lot of trouble.

Actually conceivably {{q|Q369}} is actually the first qid we didn’t move earlier. So we could do a mass compression operation for the ids.
[[Category:First 250 notes]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
